biography: Modern, garden-style local florist serving northeast Pittsburgh + houseplants, pottery, botanical gifts, cards & workshops.
full_name: Roots To Petals Studio | Florist | Plant Shop | Gifts

top_videos.text:
Oakmont is such a gem! Love exploring this Pittsburgh neighborhood for those quintessential hallmark town feels. 

Add these local small businesses to your list: 

🌸Flowers & charming goodies at roots to petal studio 

🍽️ vibey restaurant
top_videos.author: kristinalwiggins

top_videos.text: Our next Plant Bingo is in 6 days! Join us Sunday at 11am for Plant Bingo Brunch Edition at @innergroovebrewing ! We’ll play 6 exciting rounds of Bingo and you’ll have the chance to win some awesome plant prizes! Delicious Inner Groove brew
top_videos.author: rootstopetals
